notes: Source is the official Extron DXP 44/48/84/88 HDMI Series specification sheet (archived by Cinos but the original Extron document, part number 8.0-011812-D8). The DXP 88 HDMI is the original (non-4K) model supporting up to 1080p/1920x1200 at 6.75 Gbps. This series does NOT have audio de-embed outputs — that is a feature added in the later DXP HD 4K series. The front-panel RS-232 port is a 2.5 mm mini stereo jack; the controlled connector list has no 2.5 mm entry so trs-3.5 is used as the closest match. The power inlet connector type (IEC C14) is inferred from standard practice for this class of rack equipment — the spec sheet only states 'internal supply, 100-240 VAC 50-60 Hz' without naming the inlet. No USB port is present on this model. CEC is explicitly not supported.

ports.name: RS-232
ports.note: Rear panel, 9-pin female DE-9 connector. Pins: 2=Tx, 3=Rx, 5=GND.

ports.name: RS-232 (Front)
ports.note: Front panel 2.5 mm mini stereo jack (not 3.5 mm — closest available connector is trs-3.5; actual is 2.5 mm TRS). Tip=Tx, Ring=Rx, Sleeve=GND.

ports.name: AC In
ports.note: Internal power supply, 100-240 VAC 50-60 Hz. Standard IEC C14 inlet typical for 2U rack equipment with internal PSU; connector type inferred — spec sheet states internal supply but does not name the inlet type explicitly.
